overview: Bootstrap the monorepo workspace and wire cross-container integration. Standalone smoke fixture (no upstreams in this dir, so PRD/ARCH-dependent cross-checks are skipped).

tasks.title: Scaffold the monorepo workspace
tasks.description: Create the workspace config, shared tooling, and root CI skeleton.

tasks.title: Wire the backend-to-frontend typed client
tasks.description: Generate the typed API client the frontend uses to call the backend.
acceptance: the frontend imports the generated client and typechecks
